mapper.select: select * from data_dictionaries where id = #{id} and deleted = false
select * from data_dictionaries where deleted = false order by dict_type asc, sort_order asc, id asc
select * from data_dictionaries where dict_type = #{dictType} and deleted = false order by sort_order asc, id asc
mapper.insert: insert into data_dictionaries(dict_type, dict_code, dict_name, business_value, sort_order, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at, deleted) values(#{dictType}, #{dictCode}, #{dictName}, #{businessValue}, #{sortOrder}, #{enabled}, #{description}, now(), now(), false)
mapper.update: update data_dictionaries set dict_name = #{dictName}, business_value = #{businessValue}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, enabled = #{enabled}, description = #{description}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and deleted = false
update data_dictionaries set deleted = true, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and deleted = false
